description_long: This is a tall, slender obelisk constructed primarily from light gray and white marble, set against a flat stone wall. The obelisk features a prominent pyramidal tip and a rectangular base with stepped layers, giving it a monumental appearance. The front face displays engraved plaques and inscriptions, framed by two small, column-like supports. The marble surface is smooth but shows some weathering and discoloration, suggesting age and exposure to the elements. The structure is solid and immovable, likely serving as a memorial or commemorative monument in an urban park or plaza. There are no visible decorative motifs beyond the inscriptions and architectural detailing.
description: A tall, marble obelisk with a pyramidal tip, rectangular stepped base, and engraved plaques on the front. The surface is smooth and weathered, with minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the engraved plaques, column-like supports, and the full stepped base against a stone wall.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the obelisk's thin profile and the depth of the base, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate front view, similar to the front but with less visible inscription detail and a clearer view of the base structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the obelisk and the layered base.
attribute_inscription: There are visible engraved plaques with inscriptions on the front face, located centrally and at the base. The text appears to be in Latin or English, with classical serif lettering, but is only partially legible due to resolution.
attribute_ornamentation: Minimal ornamentation; the only decorative elements are the small column-like supports flanking the central plaque and the stepped architectural detailing of the base.
attribute_base_design: The base is rectangular with multiple stepped layers, constructed from the same marble as the obelisk. It features a central plaque and two small, rounded supports on either side, giving it a classical, monumental appearance.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is a simple, pointed pyramid, smoothly finished with no additional decoration or unique features.
